description: CLAUDE.md contains only '@AGENTS.md' redirect with no YAML frontmatter; cannot register as a skill.
suggested_fix: Add proper YAML frontmatter with name and description, or remove from skill discovery scope.

description: Frontmatter declares 'name: html-ppt-presenter-mode' but the directory is 'html-ppt-presenter-mode-reveal'; registry resolution by name diverges from directory-based lookup.
suggested_fix: Change 'name:' to 'html-ppt-presenter-mode-reveal' to match the directory name.

description: Frontmatter declares 'name: magazine-web-ppt' but the directory is 'guizang-ppt'; plugin install and trigger resolution diverge.
suggested_fix: Align name field with directory: change 'name:' to 'guizang-ppt', or rename directory to 'magazine-web-ppt'.

description: 'npx -y skills add heygen-com/hyperframes' downloads and executes a third-party npm package at runtime with auto-confirmation; no version pin, no hash verification.
suggested_fix: Pin to a specific package version and verify integrity with --integrity flag, or vendor the skill directly without runtime npx download.

description: postinstall script executes 'node ./scripts/postinstall.mjs' on every npm/pnpm install, running builds for multiple workspace packages automatically.
fp_reason: Script only invokes 'pnpm build' for internal workspace packages with no network calls, credential access, or dynamic code execution.
rule_gap: Rule should distinguish between postinstall scripts that perform internal deterministic builds vs those that fetch remote code or run arbitrary shell commands.
suggested_fix: No action needed; document in CONTRIBUTING.md that postinstall runs workspace builds.

description: Downloads binary spritesheet files from j20.nz and Supabase edge function; magic-byte validation present but no cryptographic integrity check. External domain not under repo owner's control.
suggested_fix: Add SHA-256 checksum verification against a signed manifest; move asset hosting to a repo-controlled CDN.

description: Fetches from hardcoded Supabase project URL; if Supabase project is transferred or compromised, fetched data changes silently. No content-hash verification.
suggested_fix: Store Supabase URL in env var; add content-hash check on response.

description: Fetches raw markdown from two YouMind-OpenLab repos at 'main' branch HEAD; upstream changes propagate silently.
suggested_fix: Pin URLs to specific commit SHAs instead of branch names.

description: Fetches model price JSON from BerriAI/litellm at 'main' branch HEAD; no version pinning.
suggested_fix: Pin to a tagged release URL.

description: OD_KEEP_HF_SYNC_TMP env var skips temp-dir cleanup; combined with npx remote execution, exposes intermediate skill content under predictable tmpdir path.
suggested_fix: Use a randomized subdirectory within tmpdir; document the env var in README.

description: CLAUDE.md has no YAML frontmatter at all — missing both 'name' (-25) and 'description' (-25) fields.
suggested_fix: Add YAML frontmatter with name and description, or exclude from skill scanning.

description: Style-reference skill has no 'triggers', no 'od:' block, and no output contract section; users cannot determine what artifact is produced.
suggested_fix: Add output contract section specifying that a 16:9 HTML deck matching these style constraints is emitted.

description: Style-reference skill has no 'triggers', no 'od:' block, and no output contract section.
suggested_fix: Add output contract section.

description: Taste style guide has no 'triggers', no 'od:' block, and no output contract section.
suggested_fix: Add output contract section; add triggers to make skill discoverable.

description: Taste style guide has no 'triggers', no 'od:' block, and no output contract section.
suggested_fix: Add output contract section; add triggers to make skill discoverable.

description: Taste style guide has no 'triggers', no 'od:' block, and no output contract section.
suggested_fix: Add output contract section; add triggers to make skill discoverable.

description: HTML-ppt subskill has no output contract section; authoring entirely deferred to master skill.
suggested_fix: Add one-line output contract: 'Produces index.html copied from template and filled with user content.'

description: HTML-ppt subskill has no output contract section.
suggested_fix: Add one-line output contract referencing template HTML file.

description: HTML-ppt subskill has no output contract section; also has name/directory mismatch (see bug finding).
suggested_fix: Fix name field and add output contract section.

description: Non-standard top-level inputs/parameters schema; output is defined inside parameters block but no standard 'od: outputs:' or '## Output contract' section; missing example_prompt.
suggested_fix: Add 'od: outputs: primary: standalone-html' and an example_prompt in frontmatter.

description: Non-standard top-level inputs/parameters schema; no standard output contract section.
suggested_fix: Add standard 'od:' block with outputs field.

description: od: mode: utility only; output contract not specified in the primary frontmatter or early body section.
suggested_fix: Add explicit output contract describing what the audit produces (annotated HTML report, diff list, or re-exported PPTX).

description: No example_prompt in frontmatter; output contract not confirmed in read window.
suggested_fix: Add example_prompt to od: block and confirm output contract exists in full file.

description: No example_prompt; output contract not confirmed in read window.
suggested_fix: Add example_prompt to od: block and confirm output contract section in full file.

description: 'choose a short appropriate name' — 'appropriate' is a vague quantifier with no fallback rule or constraints given.
suggested_fix: Replace with specific rule: 'choose a name ≤ 12 characters derived from the most prominent visual feature of the pet (e.g. color + animal: "redpanda", "mintfrog")'

description: 'keep only the knobs you decided are relevant to this artifact' — 'relevant' is underspecified; no decision rule given for what makes a knob relevant.
suggested_fix: Use the five yes/no rules already present in the skill body (accent used ≥3 times → yes; type-driven → yes; etc.) and reference them explicitly here.

description: docs/examples/saas-landing-skill/SKILL.md and skills/saas-landing/SKILL.md are nearly identical; the example version is missing 'craft: requires:' block present in production version and includes author-guidance prose not suitable for the skills/ directory.
suggested_fix: Keep example version as pure reference; ensure any production updates to skills/saas-landing are mirrored to the example or add a 'see also' cross-link.

description: The deck composer reads '../editorial-collage/styles.css' at compile time; if editorial-collage is moved or renamed, the deck composition silently fails with no skill-level warning.
suggested_fix: Add a runtime check in scripts/compose.ts that errors clearly if ../editorial-collage/styles.css is not found.

description: Two skills have name/directory mismatches: 'html-ppt-presenter-mode-reveal' dir contains name 'html-ppt-presenter-mode'; 'guizang-ppt' dir contains name 'magazine-web-ppt'. These create inconsistent identities in the skill registry.
suggested_fix: Align name fields with directory names across the repo (or vice versa).
